variations.prompt: Replace ONLY the background of the captured photo with the provided background image. STRICT REQUIREMENTS:- Keep the person exactly the same: preserve their face identity, facial features,   skin tone, hair, expression, and all unique details. The face MUST look identical   to the original captured photo — do not beautify, reshape, or alter the face.- Generate the person in FULL BODY (head to feet). If the original capture is cropped,   realistically extend and complete the missing body parts while staying consistent   with the visible clothing, body proportions, and pose.- Match the POSE exactly as in the captured photo (same body orientation, arm/leg   position, head tilt, gesture).- Keep the original clothing, colors, and accessories unchanged.BLENDING / COMPOSITING:- Seamlessly blend the subject into the new background so it looks like a single   real photograph.- Match the lighting direction, color temperature, shadows, and ambient light of   the background onto the subject.- Add realistic contact shadows and grounding so the person stands naturally within   the scene (not floating).- Match depth of field, grain, and overall color grading between subject and background.- Clean, natural edges around hair and body — no harsh cutout outlines or halos.OUTPUT: One photorealistic image, full-body subject, identical face, same pose, fully integrated with the new background.

Replace ONLY the background of the captured photo with the provided background image. STRICT REQUIREMENTS:- Keep the person exactly the same: preserve their face identity, facial features,   skin tone, hair, expression, and all unique details. The face MUST look identical   to the original captured photo — do not beautify, reshape, or alter the face.- Generate the person in FULL BODY (head to feet). If the original capture is cropped,   realistically extend and complete the missing body parts while staying consistent   with the visible clothing, body proportions, and pose.- Match the POSE exactly as in the captured photo (same body orientation, arm/leg   position, head tilt, gesture).- Keep the original clothing, colors, and accessories unchanged.BLENDING / COMPOSITING:- Seamlessly blend the subject into the new background so it looks like a single   real photograph.- Match the lighting direction, color temperature, shadows, and ambient light of   the background onto the subject.- Add realistic contact shadows and grounding so the person stands naturally within   the scene (not floating).- Match depth of field, grain, and overall color grading between subject and background.- Clean, natural edges around hair and body — no harsh cutout outlines or halos.OUTPUT: One photorealistic image, full-body subject, identical face, same pose, fully integrated with the new background.
